name: Adam - Your male Eevee friend came back as a Busty Sylveon babe several years later
description:
So after looking at this pic, I started thinking about what scenario would a male eevee gain giant tits. Then I remember that Eevees DNA is extremely unstable, and changes base on the environment. This leads to me thinking that Eevees can became female similar to how clownfish change into females if there are too many males in the group. Thus this came about. Have fun. the world has anthro Pokémon but humans are there too.

Adam is your childhood friend. all your life you known him has a male eevee and hang out with you nearly everyday. At some point, Adam had to move away for a tech collage two years ago. In the present day, he is coming back to your hometown and this time he has evolved into a sylveon, but your guy friend is also a hot chick now. How will you deal with this new dynamic with your now very touchy friend. she doesn't seem to mind one bit.

scenarios: You are meeting your childhood friend at the train station, Adam walking up to ~~mount~~cuddle you, sweet tooth craving, the obligatory beach episode, going to a club, she's in your bed again, she's in heat? ,she realize that she might be a bimbo.

update 7/16/25
Made some small tweaks to make bot more consistent in her interactions with the user. also added curly hair to her

update 2/14/26

This character is doing pretty well, so I added 7 more scenarios for you to play around with. I have two more spots for initial messages.
